professional_summary: Product and UX designer with 6 years of experience crafting intuitive digital experiences for mobile and web applications. Skilled at leading end-to-end design processes from user research and wireframing through high-fidelity prototyping and design systems. Passionate about accessibility and inclusive design.

work_experience.title: Senior Product Designer
bullets: Led UX design for core mobile application serving 2M+ users, achieving 4.7 App Store rating after redesign
Built and maintained comprehensive design systems in Figma used by 15-person design and engineering team
Conducted 50+ user research sessions and usability testing studies informing 3 major product redesigns
Improved onboarding completion rate by 44% through interaction design and information architecture improvements
Championed accessibility initiatives achieving WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across all product surfaces

work_experience.title: UX Designer
bullets: Created wireframes, prototypes, and visual design for B2B SaaS dashboard serving enterprise customers
Ran design sprints using Design Thinking methodology, validating concepts with users before engineering investment
Designed responsive design components for web and mobile using Figma and Adobe XD
Collaborated with engineering team in Zeplin to ensure pixel-perfect implementation of design specifications

work_experience.title: UI/UX Designer
bullets: Designed UI for 12 client projects across e-commerce, fintech, and healthcare verticals
Created visual design systems and brand style guides using Sketch and Illustrator
Produced motion design animations and micro-interactions in After Effects and Principle
Worked with InVision to create interactive prototyping for client presentations and usability testing

projects.name: DesignTokens.io
projects.description: Open design token library for Figma enabling cross-platform design consistency, used by 3,000+ designers
